description_long: This is a rectangular, woven picnic basket with a distinctive turquoise and white color scheme. The basket features a broad horizontal white band encircling its midsection, bordered by turquoise woven panels with vertical white accent stripes. Two sturdy, flat handles made of a light-colored material are attached to the upper rim, allowing for easy carrying. The weave is tight and uniform, giving the basket a robust and structured appearance, while the open top suggests it is designed for easy access to its contents. The interior appears spacious, suitable for carrying food, drinks, or other picnic essentials, and the basket lacks any visible lid or closure mechanism.
description: A rectangular, turquoise and white woven picnic basket with flat light handles and an open top. The basket features a tight, structured weave and a broad white band around its middle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad white band, turquoise panels, and both flat handles attached to the rim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the basket's narrow profile and the vertical alignment of the weave pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the same color banding and handle arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and vertical weave details.
attribute_handle_type: Two flat, fabric handles attached to the rim with metal fasteners; flexible and folding.
attribute_weave_pattern: Plain, tight rectangular weave with horizontal and vertical color banding.
